items.claim: Mike Davis might find another gear to win the fight.
items.quote: Maybe Mike Davis finds another gear and gets it done

items.claim: Brennan Rivero has lost three fights in a row, all by first-round finish.
items.quote: Three in a row. Finished in all of his fights in the first round.

items.claim: Brennan Rivero holds a record of two wins and five losses in the UFC.
items.quote: So this is a guy who is two and five in the UFC
